summary: REQ-2 and REQ-3 appear implemented via new #specialists and #pricing sections/links, and REQ-1 is partially implemented (pricing section with CTA behavior), but the plan name/price strings may not match the exact required text formatting (semicolons/spacing/casing). Several unrequested utilities and styling/theme changes were also introduced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each plan card must display the exact plan name and price text as provided: “Foundation plan ; 75k”, “Growth plan ; 125k”, and “Loss recovery Specialist ;175k” (preserving plan names, numbers, and semicolon/spacing unless only typography-normalized).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary indicates the pricing cards show different text (e.g., currency symbol and different casing/wording) rather than the exact strings provided in the BuildRequest.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/ContentPage.tsx (pricing section mentioned in file summary; full card text not shown in truncated diff)
